-   Undertaking performance and behavioural analysis on waste network assets

-    Interventions are actively tracked to ensure timely and effective delivery against planned outcomes.

-   Using thameswater total daily flow data - multiple years.

    -   How would you clean this data set, think by column, transforming the data types making sure is numerical etc etc, making sure data is input correctly.

    -   How would you then make use of a vlookup

    -   Make use of conditional formatting

    -   Make use of pivot tables and charts

    -   Then introduce multiple years.
